_comment: WC2026 Round of 32, 2026-06-30, Estadio Monterrey. KNOCKOUT: no draw -- level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties, so the deliverable is who ADVANCES. Routes: Netherlands won Group F (2-2 Japan, 5-1 Sweden, 3-1 Tunisia; 7 pts, GF 10, rating 89) -- a strong attacking side that won the group convincingly. Morocco finished 2nd in Group C (1-1 Brazil, 1-0 Scotland, 4-2 Haiti; 7 pts, GF 6 GA 3, rating 83) -- a quality, organized, tournament-pedigree side (2022 semifinalists) that HELD BRAZIL to a draw and has attacking threat of its own. This is NOT a favourite-vs-low-block tie: Morocco is a balanced, dangerous opponent, so it projects as a competitive game, not a containment job. Netherlands the favourite by class and form, but Morocco is a genuine live underdog that can take it to extra time (cf. Japan vs Brazil). KNOCKOUT-SPECIFIC: full motivation, no rotation; Morocco's quality lifts their advancement well above a typical 83-rated underdog. Home = Netherlands (nominal; neutral venue). Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Single-elimination: level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties. Netherlands the favourite by class and form (won Group F, 10 goals); Morocco a quality, organized side that held Brazil and reached the 2022 semis -> a competitive tie, not a containment job, with a real chance Morocco drags it to extra time.

home.name: Netherlands
notes: Strong attack (rating 89); won the group, 10 goals incl 5-1 Sweden, 3-1 Tunisia. attack 1.30.
Decent but leaked 4 in the group. defense 0.92.
Favourite by class and form; faces a quality side, so a competitive game, not a rout.

away.name: Morocco
notes: Quality, organized, tournament pedigree (2022 semis); held Brazil 1-1, beat Scotland 1-0. attack 1.05 -- a genuine threat, not a low block.
Knockout: good enough to take it to extra time -> advancement well above a typical underdog.

_recal: First pass leaned 3.6 pts above the market on Morocco (26.3% vs 22.7%): Morocco's pedigree is real, but the market (the sharper anchor) sees the Netherlands a clearer favourite. Lifted NED 1.58 -> 1.64 and trimmed MAR 1.12 -> 1.05 to align, while keeping Morocco a live underdog.
